● Not Just Ownership

Not Just Ownership.
Participation.

This is not a traditional restoration. This is not passive investment.

This is a syndicated restomod build where participants join the creation and future of a unique automotive asset.

Syndicate members support the project from the earliest stage — funding the development of a one-of-one car, staying engaged with every phase of the build, and ultimately gaining firsthand access to the finished asset while sharing in the potential appreciation of its value over time.

From strip-down to final drive — you are part of it.

Powered By TheCarCrowd

110
CURATED ASSETS
6000
REGISTERED MEMBERS
12.6
ANNUAL RATE OF RETURN SINCE 2021
2020
FIRST CAR LAUNCHED
60
YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Why Syndicate

Built on three pillars.

PILLAR 01

One of One Build

There will never be another. Car #148 — the 148th of 500 RS500s ever built — reborn as a unique, documented, investment-grade restomod.

PILLAR 02

World-Class Build Partners

The very best in innovative manufacturing and artisan craft — from coachbuilding to bleeding-edge additive manufacturing.

PILLAR 03

Exclusive Access & Experience

Designed so syndicate members experience the finished car and the journey: build visits, drive events, private invitations.

RS500 Reimagined
The Car

The Ford Sierra Cosworth RS500. Reimagined.

One of the most dominant touring cars ever built and a fan-favourite road icon — reinterpreted through modern engineering, advanced materials, precision manufacturing, and performance optimisation.

  • 01One-of-one build
  • 02Engineering-led, not cosmetic
  • 03Heritage-informed design
  • 04Built for road and track

Learn the process

Want the full picture?

Download our comprehensive Briefing Document to dive deeper into our acquisition strategy, engineering standards, and projected returns.

Partnership

A New Model of Automotive Ownership.

1

Syndicate Formation

A fixed number of participants secure allocation.

2

Build Phase

Full transparency through content and direct access.

3

Experience Phase

Driving events, track days, private access.

4

Exit Opportunity

Potential sale of the asset at premium.

Powered by SyndiIn collaboration with The Car Crowd
The Build Process

Engineered in the open.

Phase 01

Acquisition & Strip

  • —Base vehicle selection
  • —Full teardown
  • —Digital scanning
Phase 02

Design & Engineering

  • —CAD modelling
  • —Structural optimisation
  • —Performance upgrades
Phase 03

Manufacturing

  • —Fabrication
  • —Additive manufacturing
  • —Precision assembly
Phase 04

Finishing & Validation

  • —Paint & livery
  • —Road & track testing
  • —Final sign-off
Every stage documented • Every decision visible

Partners

Built with specialists.

The Syndicate RS500 is created with leading experts in coachbuilding, digital engineering, additive manufacturing, and specialist car builds.

Partner 01

T3DMC

3D Scanning & Digital Twin

Partner 02

ASM Auto Recycling

Chassis Dismantling & Cataloguing

Partner 03

Coventry Metalcraft

Chassis prep, alignment & Precision Coach building

Partner 04

Digital Manufacturing Centre - Silverstone

Assembly & Additive Manufacturing

Partner 05

BAMD Composites

Composite Structures

Partner 06

MAHLE Group

Engine Rebuild & Performance

Partner 07

Cornerstone Technologies

Non-structural Skillsets

Partner 08

HGL / VenueServe

Membership Platform & Fan Portal

This is ownership you can feel.

The Value Proposition

A Different Kind of Return.

"Financial return is only part of the story."

Shared Cost

Of a high-value build

Exclusive Asset

A one-of-one engineered car

Experiential

Events, driving, access

Upside Potential

On future sale

Syndicate Availability

Limited Allocation.

  • — Fixed number of syndicate positions
  • — Strict allocation structure
  • — Early applicants prioritised

Once filled, the opportunity closes.
